name: Rory Reed
bio: Rory Reed leads Backstage Wire's coverage of breaking music news, major artist announcements, and the pop-culture moments shaping the industry.

name: Jamie Calder
bio: Jamie Calder covers emerging artists, underground scenes, and the indie bands worth knowing before they break wide.

name: Alex Mercer
bio: Alex Mercer reports on tour announcements, festival lineups, live-music trends, and the stories shaping concert season.

name: Jordan Vale
bio: Jordan Vale covers the intersection of music and pop culture, from film and TV crossovers to fashion, awards, and viral moments.

name: Casey Monroe
bio: Casey Monroe writes about new releases, standout singles, albums, and the artists pushing new sounds forward.
